title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 13 - 2018: I HAVE to start exercising. Rode 30 miles

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs on June 13, 2018 after a 13-day gap, recapping a trip to Steamboat Springs and Strawberry Hot Springs including biking and watching an Ironman finish. He describes alarming physical symptoms from too much sedentary work — flat glutes cutting off circulation, severe knee pain, and leg numbness — that finally forced him to commit to daily cycling. He also updates on his Google Earth cloud-city mapping project and ongoing website struggles.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Must start cycling every day — his body is physically breaking down from sitting too long
Will never truly be finished; there are always 50 more things to do, so he has to stop waiting and just keep working in shorter sessions
Caused real circulation and nerve damage he can feel — flat glutes, knee pain, leg pain up to his head

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to Strawberry Hot Springs in Steamboat for a couple of days.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did a Copenhagen-Werebike and rode up in Car 5.5 and Boulder Canyon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I headed to the lake up 4th to our trail and drove up towards Rundmark.

claims.claim: I ate out a lot, quarter by my house with plants, just fine.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been wanting to get in shape, especially in this day and age with repeat three players and music and good earphones.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I couldn't get in shape because I was working on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized that I'm never gonna finish my website because there's probably like 50 things that I haven't even thought of that I'll have to do before I'm even done with anything.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was expecting a time to come where I had to do something physically, and it had to sort of happen on its own.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This realization happened right before my fiance came to visit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I felt like I was about to die because I felt toxic inside.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I lost my interest in the internet, reading, and learning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My lower back started hurting, and my right bloodics got really flat and painful.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I felt like the muscle got so flat that it squeezed all the tendons and blood vessels, closing them up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom gave me a gel thing to sit on, but I still felt pain moving up my leg to my knee.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I could tell the pain was connected to my blood.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My knee was in extreme pain, and I couldn't bend it all the way down.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I slept on my left foot, and it felt like I cut out the circulation to my knee.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I sit down, my butt starts hurting, and I don't even know if I did it right.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to be riding all the time and stretching to improve.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was doing cloud cities and turning all of the mountains because it's so beautiful up there.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized that all towns have a certain size, and they're small, about a kilometer around.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I made a size chart on my left side before actually looking at all these towns.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I compared the size of towns to my neighborhood and realized they're all around the edges.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went on a ride but turned around because the thing that holds my rear wheel on is the one I've used for my rollers, and I didn't have the wrenches.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I get a flat like every other time I ride that bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm motivated to clean up my house now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't uploaded my folder raw of these clouds because of a weird password thing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I uploaded with my server, but when I downloaded it, it was the old one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to fix Dreamy for an upload to make sure everything is current with my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's a lot of work to keep all the Google Earth files current with my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been trying to do this since I was 10 years old.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My parents took away my permissions, which messed with my head.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got started late, and the computers were too slow, and my body broke down before I could finish.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll finish my website one of these days.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I'll do a vlog again when I'm in my right and do right tomorrow.
